title: Germany stops gas stations from raising pump prices more than once a day
summary_full: Germany is introducing a fuel package to prevent powerful gas companies from "abusive fuel price increases," as the Middle East conflict continues.
summary_public: Germany is introducing a fuel package to prevent powerful gas companies from "abusive fuel price increases," as the Middle East conflict continues.

DE.label: positive
DE.evidence: Germany stops gas stations from raising pump prices more than once a day
